details.test: Task 1: RSVP to highest-rated free beginner in-person meetup this Saturday
Task 2: Join an event in the evening window and message the host
Task 3: Create new account with intermediate level and weekly notifications
Task 4: Choose longer paid workshop and add to My Events
Task 5: Create new in-person intermediate conversation meetup next month
Task 6: Purchase Standard $15 monthly membership using WELCOME10 promo code
Task 7: Bookmark three free events and open them in saved-events calendar view
Task 8: Update profile with location, evening availability, and IELTS goal
Task 9: Enroll in pronunciation course series and add all sessions to calendar
